## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / preset
- [ ] Physics correctness change (must cite peer-reviewed reference below)

- [ ] CI / build

## Verification

How was this tested?

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` clean
- [ ] `npx vite build` succeeds
- [ ] `cargo test --release` passes (or CI green)
- [ ] Manual test of the affected workflow (describe below)

```
<!-- paste relevant test output if applicable -->
```

## Screenshots (for UI changes)

## Checklist
- [ ] One logical change per commit; commit message explains the *why*
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` trailers added
- [ ] No AI-attribution references in code or commits
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] ROADMAP.md / TODO.md ticked if this closes a roadmap item
